name: teryt-mcp-monorepo
description: Monorepo for MCP Kit and the TERYT MCP server.

scripts.quality: pnpm run quality:framework && pnpm --filter teryt-mcp quality
scripts.quality:framework: pnpm run quality:framework:knip && pnpm run quality:framework:types && pnpm run quality:framework:lint && pnpm run quality:framework:deps && pnpm run quality:framework:architecture && pnpm run quality:framework:coverage
scripts.quality:framework:deps: dependency-cruiser --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs packages/core/src packages/node/src packages/cli/src packages/core/test packages/node/test packages/cli/test
scripts.quality:framework:types: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/node/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
